items.name: One Choice with Rice
items.description: Your choice of stir fried dish with Rice in one container.

items.name: Chicken Spring Roll
items.description: One piece spring roll filled with chicken mince and mixed vegetables.

items.name: Vegetable Spring Rolls
items.description: One piece spring roll filled with mixed vegetables.

items.name: Chicken Fried Dim Sim
items.description: Crispy fried dim sim filled with seasoned chicken, lightly golden on the outside.

items.name: Chicken Steamed Dim Sim
items.description: Six pieces. Filled with seasoned chicken and juicy inside.

items.name: Prawn Chips
items.description: Crispy prawns chips.

items.name: Honey Chicken
items.description: Finger sized battered chicken breast with special honey sauce and sesame on top (no veggies).

items.name: Satay Chicken
items.description: Thin sliced chicken breast and vegetables stir fried with delicious aromatic blend of peanuts, oriental herbs and spices.

items.name: Mongolian Beef
items.description: Stir-fried beef in a savoury sauce.

items.name: Beef with Black Bean Sauce
items.description: Beef and bell pepper stir fried in Chinese fermented black bean sauce, sharp, salty and thick with a hint of sweet.

items.name: Salt and Pepper Fried Fish
items.description: Deep fried battered fish fillet chunks blend with chilli paste.

items.name: Teriyaki Chicken
items.description: Thin cut chicken breast stir fried with mix vegetables in traditional Japanese teriyaki sauce, savoury, salty and sweet with lots of umami undertones.

items.name: Sweet and Sour Chicken
items.description: Deep fried battered chicken with sweet and sour sauce.

items.name: Chicken with Vegetables
items.description: Thin cut chicken breast, stir fried with mixed vegetables in flavourful garlic and oyster sauce.

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Thin cut chicken breast stir fried with mixed vegetables in Chinese hot fermented bean paste (郫县豆瓣酱).

items.name: Curry Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken pieces wok-tossed in a rich, mildly spiced curry sauce with mixed vegetables.

items.name: Beef with Black Pepper
items.description: Sliced beef stir-fried with onion and capsicum in a bold black pepper sauce.

items.name: Singapore Noodles
items.description: Rice vermicelli noodle with a meat of your choice egg, shallot, and mix vegetables.

items.name: Thai Pad See Ew
items.description: Thick rice noodle with a meat of your choice, egg, mixed vegetables, soy sauce and oyster sauce. Picture is seafood Pad See Ew.

items.name: Pad Thai
items.description: Thin rice noodle with a meat of your choice, egg, peanuts, shallots, and tamarind sauce.

items.name: Chow Mein
items.description: Served with mixed vegetables and egg noodles. Picture is seafood Chow Mein.

items.name: Stir Fry Flat Rice Noodle
items.description: Savory flat rice noodles stir-fried with soy sauce for a comforting, tender dish.

items.name: Mee Goreng
items.description: A sticky, savory sweet Indonesian stir-fried noodle dish with your choice of meat.

items.name: Chicken Wonton Noodle Soup
items.description: Chewy egg noodles and wonton dumplings, combined and served in a flavorful slow cooked chicken broth. Top with choy sum. The wontons are filled with a combination of minced Chicken and vegetable, lightly flavored with sesame oil, soy sauce and grated ginger.

items.name: Laksa Soup
items.description: Deliciously hearty noodle soup with a meat of your choice. Coconut milk, and Asian vegetables.

items.name: Tomyum Noodle Soup
items.description: A classic Thai dish featuring a spicy, hot and sour broth enriched with Thai seasonings, spices, and fresh lime juice.

items.name: Nasi Goreng
items.description: A delicious stir-fried Indonesian rice sweet, spicy and packed with savory deliciousness.

items.name: Chinese Special Fried Rice
items.description: The base ingredients include egg and mixed vegetables.

items.name: Thai Fried Rice
items.description: Authentic Thai style Stir-fried rice with Thai basil, scrambled egg, chilies, and fish sauce. Choose chicken, beef, or king prawn.

items.name: Crispy Chicken with Rice or Noodle Soup
items.description: The chicken is poached very gently, then dipped in vinegar and maltose, dried and deep-fried for the crispy skin, served with fried egg, steam vegetables and your selection of carbs.

items.name: Beef Brisket
items.description: Slowly braised savory sweet beef brisket served in a hot rich beef bone broth.

items.name: Steamed Rice
items.description: Freshly cooked white rice.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Ingredients include rice, egg, peas, carrot, corn kernels etc. no ham, garlic or spring onion.

items.name: Soft Drink Can
items.description: 375ml

items.name: Soft Drink Bottle
items.description: 600ml

items.name: Water Bottle
items.description: Fresh and refreshing drinking water.

items.name: Chicken Corn Soup
items.description: Tender chicken and corn in a comforting soup.
